reasoning: Alibaba has released highly capable models, including Qwen 2.5-Max (which peaked around #7) and the newer hybrid Qwen 3 models as of May 2025. However, the Chatbot Arena is heavily dominated by frontier models from US big tech (OpenAI, Google, Anthropic), which are simultaneously releasing massive next-generation models (e.g. Claude 4 Opus, Gemini 2.5, and the pending GPT-5). Polymarket priced Alibaba's chances at just 0.01 in June. Beating all frontier models to the absolute #1 spot by December 31 is highly improbable, so I am forecasting at the lowest allowable probability threshold.
